ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported data */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "cumulative_positive" INTEGER /* Cumulative positive cases reported */,
  "cumulative_deceased" INTEGER /* Cumulative deaths reported */,
  "cumulative_recovered" INTEGER /* Cumulative recoveries reported */,
  "currently_positive" INTEGER /* Currently positive cases */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalized cases */,
  "intensive_care" INTEGER /* Number of cases in intensive care */,
  "eu_country" INTEGER /* Is the country a member of the EU? */,
  "eucpm_country" INTEGER /* Is the country part of the EU Common Policy? */,
  "nuts" TEXT /* NUTS region code */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests per 1,000 people */,
  "test_positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of tests that are positive */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., WHO, local health department) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_iso3 FOREIGN KEY ("iso3") REFERENCES countries ("iso3"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_nuts FOREIGN KEY ("nuts") REFERENCES regions ("nuts")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region that the country belongs to */,
  "eu_country" INTEGER /* Is the country a member of the EU? */,
  "eucpm_country" INTEGER /* Is the country part of the EU Common Policy? */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "healthcare_expenditure" REAL /* Healthcare expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  "healthcare_rank" INTEGER /* Country's healthcare system ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso3")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "nuts" TEXT /* NUTS region code */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the region */,
  "beds_per_1000" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1,000 people */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nuts")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported data */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 country code */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalized cases */,
  "intensive_care" INTEGER /* Number of cases in intensive care */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  "icu_occupancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of ICU beds occupied */,
  "hospital_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of hospital beds */,
  "hospital_occupancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of hospital beds occupied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_iso3 FOREIGN KEY ("iso3") REFERENCES countries ("iso3")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, capacity assessment) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the user account active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Was the access attempt successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
